title: hymenocrater bituminosus subsp. calycinus
intro: Hymenocrater bituminosus subsp. calycinus is a rare species of flowering plant in the mint family, also known as a type of mint or sage. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Hymenocrater bituminosus subsp. calycinus include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
